assertions.assertion: Operational store or token cleanup is configured with EnableTokenCleanup = true and TokenCleanupInterval = 1800
assertions.rationale: AddOperationalStore configures EnableTokenCleanup = true and TokenCleanupInterval = 1800.

assertions.assertion: RemoveConsumedTokens is set to true and ConsumedTokenCleanupDelay is set to 300
assertions.rationale: The response does NOT set RemoveConsumedTokens = true or ConsumedTokenCleanupDelay = 300. It only mentions cleanup generically and suggests checking documentation.
